entry.title: Love!!!!
entry.content: I absolutely love this app, it makes group dinners so easy to spilt. I recommend it to all my friends!

Love!!!!

I absolutely love this app, it makes group dinners so easy to spilt. I recommend it to all my friends!

entry.title: Annoying
entry.content: I originally downloaded this a while ago but I forgot why I deleted it. Oh yeah redownloading it today gave me the refresher because if it’s a file of a receipt you can’t upload it and no matter how clear a screenshot is somehow it’s still blurry. Why tf would I download a receipt splitting app to hand split a 72 item receipt when I’m trying single screenshot by single screenshot of a perfectly clear file and nope it’s blurry. HOW ITS CLEAR ASF IT CANT GET ANY CLEARER

Annoying

I originally downloaded this a while ago but I forgot why I deleted it. Oh yeah redownloading it today gave me the refresher because if it’s a file of a receipt you can’t upload it and no matter how clear a screenshot is somehow it’s still blurry. Why tf would I download a receipt splitting app to hand split a 72 item receipt when I’m trying single screenshot by single screenshot of a perfectly clear file and nope it’s blurry. HOW ITS CLEAR ASF IT CANT GET ANY CLEARER

entry.title: Where has this been all my life?
entry.content: A very useful app indeed.

Where has this been all my life?

A very useful app indeed.

entry.title: Lifechanging
entry.content: This app is so good, I’ve been using it for years and recommended it to basically everyone I know.

Lifechanging

This app is so good, I’ve been using it for years and recommended it to basically everyone I know.

entry.title: Garbage
entry.content: Garbage

Garbage

Garbage

entry.title: Toggle Option
entry.content: Very nice app! So convenient when having to split checks. A toggle option to view the picture of the receipt while making edits would be nice.

Toggle Option

Very nice app! So convenient when having to split checks. A toggle option to view the picture of the receipt while making edits would be nice.

entry.title: Used to be good, much better options available these days
entry.content:
For many years, this was my go to app to split the dinner bill. It wasn’t always perfect, but it was the best available at the time. It’s pretty frustrating when it gets it wrong though, because when you’re at dinner with a large group of friends…trying to figure it out, there’s a lot of pressure and it just gets confusing not knowing which price it got wrong.
Thankfully, tech has improved, and now I can’t live without “fairShare - split the bill”. It has all the bells and whistles and features you could want while still keeping the UI simple and clean. Best part is it’s always accurate and all my friends can pick their own items without downloading the app or needing a login. Easy Peezy.

Used to be good, much better options available these days

For many years, this was my go to app to split the dinner bill. It wasn’t always perfect, but it was the best available at the time. It’s pretty frustrating when it gets it wrong though, because when you’re at dinner with a large group of friends…trying to figure it out, there’s a lot of pressure and it just gets confusing not knowing which price it got wrong.

Thankfully, tech has improved, and now I can’t live without “fairShare - split the bill”. It has all the bells and whistles and features you could want while still keeping the UI simple and clean. Best part is it’s always accurate and all my friends can pick their own items without downloading the app or needing a login. Easy Peezy.

entry.title: Rarely works
entry.content: It only works sometimes and it’s so frustrating. You would think we have better technology by now

Rarely works

It only works sometimes and it’s so frustrating. You would think we have better technology by now

entry.title: Great. Missing Zelle
entry.content: Really like this app. Great for groups. Would love for more payment options. Zelle maybe?

Great. Missing Zelle

Really like this app. Great for groups. Would love for more payment options. Zelle maybe?

entry.title: Almost perfect
entry.content: This app would be perfect if each user splitting the bill had a different color assigned. That way it would be easier to track which line items have been assigned to each user. For share items the line could have multiple colors.

Almost perfect

This app would be perfect if each user splitting the bill had a different color assigned. That way it would be easier to track which line items have been assigned to each user. For share items the line could have multiple colors.
Works so well idk how it’s free

10/10

Works so well idk how it’s free

entry.title: Cannot upload images
entry.content: Missing the most basic feature… you can only use if you take a photo of the receipt. You cannot upload a previous photo

Cannot upload images

Missing the most basic feature… you can only use if you take a photo of the receipt. You cannot upload a previous photo

entry.title: Tax input not working
entry.content: The app works great except for the fact that the tax button is broken and you cannot calculate the correct amount

Tax input not working

The app works great except for the fact that the tax button is broken and you cannot calculate the correct amount

entry.title: Great app
entry.content: Used this for years. Just a simple yet great tool

Great app

Used this for years. Just a simple yet great tool

entry.title: Not really simpler
entry.content: Does what its supposed to, but frustrating to have to manage automatic tip addition each time I use it. Not all expenses are tip-able.

Not really simpler

Does what its supposed to, but frustrating to have to manage automatic tip addition each time I use it. Not all expenses are tip-able.

entry.title: SO unintuitive
entry.content: it’s truly as if this app was built to be difficult to use. it’s horrible at scanning a picture of a receipt. you have to enter in manually and it takes ages. the bills auto delete after just a couple of weeks.

SO unintuitive

it’s truly as if this app was built to
be difficult to use. it’s horrible at scanning a picture of a receipt. you have to enter in manually and it takes ages. the bills auto delete after just a couple of weeks.

entry.title: Great for splitting tabs
entry.content: Always a problem with restaurants not splitting it into too many cheques. But this app makes it a breeze. Scans your receipt so you don’t have to hand type everything and lets you pick what you ate. I’ve never tried the bank integration but splitting the bill has definitely become less of a hassle. Totally recommend if you are usually in groups that need it split.

Great for splitting tabs

Always a problem with restaurants not splitting it into too many cheques. But this app makes it a breeze. Scans your receipt so you don’t have to hand type everything and lets you pick what you ate. I’ve never tried the bank integration but splitting the bill has definitely become less of a hassle. Totally recommend if you are usually in groups that need it split.

entry.title: Font
entry.content: Excellent app! Sometimes I have issues downloading the info cause it doesn’t recognize some fonts.

Font

Excellent app! Sometimes I have issues downloading the info cause it doesn’t recognize some fonts.

entry.title: Tab
entry.content: Great app

Tab

Great app

entry.title: Discounts Incorrect
entry.content:
There needs to be an option to add a percentage as a discount and not just the total of the discount itself. It’s not calculating each persons total correct because it’s splitting the discount with everyone. How would it know where the $120 discount came from? When everyone received 20% off the bill? When I do the math myself it’s not splitting or calculating correctly. The option to add a discount on the bill as a “percentage” would be very helpful.
Same thing with adding tax. I should be able to insert the tax percentage like I can with tip instead of only being able to add the amount manually.

Discounts Incorrect

There needs to be an option to add a percentage as a discount and not just the total of the discount itself. It’s not calculating each persons total correct because it’s splitting the discount with everyone. How would it know where the $120 discount came from? When everyone received 20% off the bill? When I do the math myself it’s not splitting or calculating correctly. The option to add a discount on the bill as a “percentage” would be very helpful.

Same thing with adding tax. I should be able to insert the tax percentage like I can with tip instead of only being able to add the amount manually.

entry.title: Great app
entry.content: Efficient and effective

Great app

Efficient and effective

entry.title: Game changer!
entry.content: Using this app on a girl’s trip made splitting the costs so easy! Unlike most similar apps, I was able to split the tabs easily, without everyone having to have an account or join the bill to claim their items. 10/10 recommend!

Game changer!

Using this app on a girl’s trip made splitting the costs so easy! Unlike most similar apps, I was able to split the tabs easily, without everyone having to have an account or join the bill to claim their items. 10/10 recommend!

entry.title: Let me upload images
entry.content: Took a photo last night of a receipt. I want to use that image 🤷🏻‍♂️

Let me upload images

Took a photo last night of a receipt. I want to use that image 🤷🏻‍♂️

entry.title: Used to work better
entry.content: I’ve had this app forever and known the workarounds well but the last 3-4, admittedly infrequent uses, it’s failed horribly. Dropping items, tax, or adding something that isn’t a menu item.

Used to work better

I’ve had this app forever and known the workarounds well but the last 3-4, admittedly infrequent uses, it’s failed horribly. Dropping items, tax, or adding something that isn’t a menu item.

entry.title: Used and loved for years
entry.content: It is so helpful for splitting checks! One of my favorite apps.

Used and loved for years

It is so helpful for splitting checks! One of my favorite apps.

entry.title: I love this app!
entry.content: I love this app sooo much. I’ve been using it for years and it’s such a huge help when you dine out with friends/people and you want to split the tab evenly. You might have to manually input things once in a while when the camera can’t get the whole receipt but other than that it’s a great app!

I love this app!

I love this app sooo much. I’ve been using it for years and it’s such a huge help when you dine out with friends/people and you want to split the tab evenly. You might have to manually input things once in a while when the camera can’t get the whole receipt but other than that it’s a great app!

entry.title: Best App
entry.content: I use the app frequently with friends and it never fails!

Best App

I use the app frequently with friends and it never fails!

entry.title: Tips SUCK
entry.content: Horrible! Mandatory tip calculations SUCK!

Tips SUCK

Horrible! Mandatory tip calculations SUCK!

entry.title: A Must-Have for Group Dining
entry.content:
Great app with a clear mission, a simple interface, and excellent usability. It does exactly what it needs to do.
The app accurately scans most receipts and includes an editor for the few that need manual adjustments.
You can pass your phone around so everyone can tag their items, or share a code for friends who already have the app.
There’s also a birthday feature that lets you easily include or exclude the birthday person when splitting the bill.

A Must-Have for Group Dining

Great app with a clear mission, a simple interface, and excellent usability. It does exactly what it needs to do.

The app accurately scans most receipts and includes an editor for the few that need manual adjustments.

You can pass your phone around so everyone can tag their items, or share a code for friends who already have the app.

There’s also a birthday feature that lets you easily include or exclude the birthday person when splitting the bill.

entry.title: Not accurate
entry.content: The app is convenient at times but not very accurate. I’ve tried to use it plenty of times with well lit and clear pictures and the numbers it pulls is crazy sometimes…not really worth it

Not accurate

The app is convenient at times but not very accurate. I’ve tried to use it plenty of times with well lit and clear pictures and the numbers it pulls is crazy sometimes…not really worth it

entry.title: Great simple app
entry.content: Lifesaver app for going to dinner with friends. Simple UI and makes it easy to use. No problems making the checks split. Venmo integration is buggy but screenshotting works fine. Highly recommend!

Great simple app

Lifesaver app for going to dinner with friends. Simple UI and makes it easy to use. No problems making the checks split. Venmo integration is buggy but screenshotting works fine. Highly recommend!

entry.title: It works!
entry.content: With all the eating with different families and sports team, Tab is super easy to use. I took a picture of the receipt and it OCR and created a receipt in the app that I can just click line items. It auto added tax and I can adjust the tip amount. So easy!

It works!

With all the eating with different families and sports team, Tab is super easy to use. I took a picture of the receipt and it OCR and created a receipt in the app that I can just click line items. It auto added tax and I can adjust the tip amount. So easy!

entry.title: Good but glitchy
entry.content: It’s an awesome tool when it works. The issue is it doesn’t work half the time. It will often record the date or time on the receipt as a price and throw everything off. Or sometimes it won’t scan or read items randomly in the middle of the bill. Sometimes I have to scan receipts two or three times before it starts to work.

Good but glitchy

It’s an awesome tool when it works. The issue is it doesn’t work half the time. It will often record the date or time on the receipt as a price and throw everything off. Or sometimes it won’t scan or read items randomly in the middle of the bill. Sometimes I have to scan receipts two or three times before it starts to work.

entry.title: Ok
entry.content: Works ok. Pretty difficult to navigate at first and still difficult after you figure out how it works. Not very intuitive. Can’t edit bills after 1 week.

Ok

Works ok. Pretty difficult to navigate at first and still difficult after you figure out how it works. Not very intuitive. Can’t edit bills after 1 week.

entry.title: Tax, Venmo
entry.content: There’s no ability to add tax manually, venmo doesn’t connect

Tax, Venmo

There’s no ability to add tax manually, venmo doesn’t connect

entry.title: so awesome!
entry.content:
this makes my life so much easier!! honestly i love this
the only thing i would like is if they wouldn’t do automatic tax
you can even input your own information for the check! it’s so great

so awesome!

this makes my life so much easier!! honestly i love this

the only thing i would like is if they wouldn’t do automatic tax

you can even input your own information for the check! it’s so great

entry.title: Everything I need
entry.content: How is this not a regular used app?? It’s amazing, adjustable, easy to use and integrates with either in-vivo pictures or pictures I’ve previously taken! I’ve had the “pleasure” of being the guy who calculates what everyone owes me and their tax and tip. This breaks it down into each person’s stuff, lets me add multiple people to the same item, and even divide an item into 3rds, 4ths, or 5ths! It’s awesome, cannot recommend it enough

Everything I need

How is this not a regular used app?? It’s amazing, adjustable, easy to use and integrates with either in-vivo pictures or pictures I’ve previously taken! I’ve had the “pleasure” of being the guy who calculates what everyone owes me and their tax and tip. This breaks it down into each person’s stuff, lets me add multiple people to the same item, and even divide an item into 3rds, 4ths, or 5ths! It’s awesome, cannot recommend it enough

entry.title: Doesn’t Capture Well
entry.content: Tried about four times and after the initial photo is taken of the bill, it only captures specific items and omits several others. This app might work if you’re at a restaurant splitting one item, but don’t count on it working for anything else but that.

Doesn’t Capture Well

Tried about four times and after the initial photo is taken of the bill, it only captures specific items and omits several others. This app might work if you’re at a restaurant splitting one item, but don’t count on it working for anything else but that.

entry.title: Game Changer for Groups
entry.content: Love using this to split the dinner bill with my friends! Makes it so much easier on the wait staff and we don’t worry about getting totals mixed up.

Game Changer for Groups

Love using this to split the dinner bill with my friends! Makes it so much easier on the wait staff and we don’t worry about getting totals mixed up.

entry.title: Just what i needed
entry.content: simple, makes math and recording easier. no need for all the integration nonsense but venmo could be nice if they got it working.

Just what i needed

simple, makes math and recording easier. no need for all the integration nonsense but venmo could be nice if they got it working.

entry.title: hallucinating money
entry.content: the first page of the app works great from scanning the receipt picture, but for some reason on the subtotal page it was adding a ton of money from nowhere to my bill. also can’t connect venmo.

hallucinating money

the first page of the app works great from scanning the receipt picture, but for some reason on the subtotal page it was adding a ton of money from nowhere to my bill. also can’t connect venmo.

entry.title: Great App!!
entry.content: Smooth process and simple interface

Great App!!

Smooth process and simple interface

entry.title: Worst App Ever
entry.content: Have never used it, when I upload receipt it captured on 2 items off a receipt with 15 items. Second time I tried it added items but didn’t have correct price with each thing. Absolutely horrible, deleting right away

Worst App Ever

Have never used it, when I upload receipt it captured on 2 items off a receipt with 15 items. Second time I tried it added items but didn’t have correct price with each thing. Absolutely horrible, deleting right away

entry.title: Great tool, but needs options
entry.content: It’s an awesome free tool EXCEPT it factors tip without tax, which is not how most people determine tip. When you select 20% somewhere it’s based on Total to include tax. I’m going to have to look for another tool or hope they add an option.

Great tool, but needs options

It’s an awesome free tool EXCEPT it factors tip without tax, which is not how most people determine tip. When you select 20% somewhere it’s based on Total to include tax. I’m going to have to look for another tool or hope they add an option.

entry.title: Best tab splitter when out with friends
entry.content: I love this app! I whip it out every time I’m out with friends and it makes our lives so much easier!

Best tab splitter when out with friends

I love this app! I whip it out every time I’m out with friends and it makes our lives so much easier!

entry.title: Terrible
entry.content: It’s not calculating the bill correctly

Terrible

It’s not calculating the bill correctly

entry.title: Tax option not working
entry.content: I think this app is overall great, but not sure why it doesn’t allow me to change the tax section. I found a loophole to add it as an item but it seems like that’s an issue that needs to resolve.

Tax option not working

I think this app is overall great, but not sure why it doesn’t allow me to change the tax section. I found a loophole to add it as an item but it seems like that’s an issue that needs to resolve.

entry.title: The best!
entry.content: Tab has saved so much time and energy splitting the bill with friends. I only wish the Venmo functionality would work. THAT would be totally 5/5 stars.

The best!

Tab has saved so much time and energy splitting the bill with friends. I only wish the Venmo functionality would work. THAT would be totally 5/5 stars.

entry.title: love it, just wish it had venmo connection
entry.content: 4/5, would give 5/5 if the venmo connection worked

love it, just wish it had venmo connection

4/5, would give 5/5 if the venmo connection worked

entry.title: One of the best apps but…
entry.content: It saves sonic headache of having to manually divide up restaurant items buttttt I wish you can connect to Venmo. It has the option but it’s stuck on the Authorizing App screen:/ Besides that, great app

One of the best apps but…

It saves sonic headache of having to manually divide up restaurant items buttttt I wish you can connect to Venmo. It has the option but it’s stuck on the Authorizing App screen:/ Besides that, great app
